title: Feature Knowledge Base Schema
description: Schema for defining feature knowledge bases used in time series modeling, risk analytics, and derived feature generation. Separate from WrenMDL schema as it serves different flows.

feature.description: A single feature definition with natural language description and metadata enrichment

name.description: Unique identifier for the feature (column name in source data)

displayName.description: Human-readable name for UI and reports

description.description: Detailed natural language description of what this feature represents

purpose.description: The analytical purpose and use cases for this feature

isTimeSeries.description: Whether this feature is tracked over time for time series analysis

enumMetadataRef.description: Reference to enum metadata table for enrichment

table.description: Name of the enum metadata table

code.description: Code value in the enum metadata table

enumType.description: Enum type within the table (if applicable)

derivedFrom.description: Source features or signals this feature is derived from

relatedFeatures.description: Other features that are conceptually related

description.description: Description of this category and its purpose

features.description: List of features in this category

name.description: Name of this feature knowledge base

entityType.description: The entity type these features apply to

description.description: Overall description of this feature knowledge base

sourceSchemas.description: Source schema files that define the raw data

enumMetadataTables.description: Enum metadata tables used for enrichment

categories.description: Feature categories organizing the knowledge base
